message:
feat(gui): add swap layouts, floating pane toggle, and stack cycling actions

Implement 5 new keyboard-driven layout management actions:

- SwapLayoutNext/Prev (Ctrl+Space / Ctrl+Shift+Space): cycle through
  swap layout configurations
- SwapToLayoutIndex: jump directly to a specific layout by index
- ToggleFloatingPane (Ctrl+Shift+F): create or dismiss floating overlay
  panes with FloatingPaneRect in spawn machinery
- CycleStackForward/Backward (Ctrl+Shift+] / Ctrl+Shift+[): navigate
  stacked panes within layout slots

Wire all actions into command dispatch, spawn infrastructure, and
termwindow event handlers.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1980,6 +1980,54 @@ pub fn derive_command_from_key_assignment(action: &KeyAssignment) -> Option<Comm
                 RotationDirection::CounterClockwise => "md_rotate_left",
             }),
         },
+        SwapLayoutNext => CommandDef {
+            brief: "Swap to Next Layout".into(),
+            doc: "Cycle to the next swap layout (grid, main-side, stacked, etc.)".into(),
+            keys: vec![(Modifiers::CTRL, "Space".into())],
+            args: &[ArgType::ActiveTab],
+            menubar: &["Window", "Layout"],
+            icon: Some("md_view_compact"),
+        },
+        SwapLayoutPrev => CommandDef {
+            brief: "Swap to Previous Layout".into(),
+            doc: "Cycle to the previous swap layout".into(),
+            keys: vec![(Modifiers::CTRL.union(Modifiers::SHIFT), "Space".into())],
+            args: &[ArgType::ActiveTab],
+            menubar: &["Window", "Layout"],
+            icon: Some("md_view_compact"),
+        },
+        SwapToLayoutIndex(index) => CommandDef {
+            brief: format!("Swap to Layout {index}").into(),
+            doc: format!("Jump to swap layout index {index}").into(),
+            keys: vec![],
+            args: &[ArgType::ActiveTab],
+            menubar: &["Window", "Layout"],
+            icon: None,
+        },
+        ToggleFloatingPane => CommandDef {
+            brief: "Toggle Floating Pane".into(),
+            doc: "Toggle a floating pane overlay. Creates a new floating pane or removes the focused one.".into(),
+            keys: vec![(Modifiers::CTRL.union(Modifiers::SHIFT), "f".into())],
+            args: &[ArgType::ActiveTab],
+            menubar: &["Window", "Floating"],
+            icon: Some("md_picture_in_picture"),
+        },
+        CycleStackForward => CommandDef {
+            brief: "Cycle Stack Forward".into(),
+            doc: "Show the next pane in the current layout stack slot".into(),
+            keys: vec![(Modifiers::CTRL.union(Modifiers::SHIFT), "]".into())],
+            args: &[ArgType::ActiveTab],
+            menubar: &["Window", "Stack"],
+            icon: Some("md_layers"),
+        },
+        CycleStackBackward => CommandDef {
+            brief: "Cycle Stack Backward".into(),
+            doc: "Show the previous pane in the current layout stack slot".into(),
+            keys: vec![(Modifiers::CTRL.union(Modifiers::SHIFT), "[".into())],
+            args: &[ArgType::ActiveTab],
+            menubar: &["Window", "Stack"],
+            icon: Some("md_layers"),
+        },
         SplitPane(split) => {
             let direction = split.direction;
             CommandDef {
@@ -2099,6 +2147,12 @@ fn compute_default_actions() -> Vec<KeyAssignment> {
         }),
         RotatePanes(RotationDirection::Clockwise),
         RotatePanes(RotationDirection::CounterClockwise),
+        // --- Swap Layouts & Floating Panes ---
+        SwapLayoutNext,
+        SwapLayoutPrev,
+        ToggleFloatingPane,
+        CycleStackForward,
+        CycleStackBackward,
         ActivateTab(0),
         ActivateTab(1),
         ActivateTab(2),
